spapDescription: Your state pharmaceutical assistance program helps eligible residents in Detroit afford prescription medications.
spapEligibility: Income-based eligibility; contact program for details

programs.name: Medicare Extra Help (Low-Income Subsidy)
programs.description: Helps pay Part D premiums, deductibles, and copays

discountPrograms.name: GoodRx
discountPrograms.description: Free prescription discount card accepted at most pharmacies

faqs.question: What prescription assistance programs are available in Detroit?
faqs.answer: Detroit residents can access Medicare Extra Help, state pharmaceutical assistance programs, manufacturer patient assistance programs, and discount cards.

faqs.question: How do I apply for Extra Help in Detroit?
faqs.answer: Apply online at ssa.gov, by phone at 1-800-772-1213, or at your local Social Security office.
